# Punto Reforma Mallorca

> Architecture and total renovations in Mallorca — for homes, apartments and commercial spaces. Custom carpentry, prime kitchens and bathrooms, project management and permits, from first idea to handover. One responsible contact throughout.

> Arquitectura de interiores y reformas integrales en Mallorca — para viviendas, pisos y locales comerciales. Carpintería a medida, cocinas y baños prime, coordinación de obra y gestión de permisos, desde la primera idea hasta la entrega. Un solo interlocutor responsable durante todo el proceso.

## Contact

- Website: https://mallorca.puntoreforma.es/
- Email: info@puntoreforma.es
- Phone: +34 662 411 064
- Location: Mallorca, Spain

## Services

- Reforma integral & gestión de obra — complete renovations for homes, apartments and commercial spaces, from first concept to handover
- Arquitectura & diseño — architecture, layout, material direction and design decisions for renovation projects
- Cocinas & baños prime — kitchens and bathrooms designed as central parts of the renovation
- Carpintería a medida & metal — bespoke wardrobes, storage, built-ins, furniture and custom metal constructions
- Comprobaciones técnicas & permisos — technical checks, permit coordination and engineer procedures

## Pages

- [Home](https://mallorca.puntoreforma.es/): Services, process, gallery and contact form
- [Blog](https://mallorca.puntoreforma.es/blog/): Renovation guides and articles for Mallorca

## Blog Articles

- [Cuánto tarda una reforma en Mallorca](https://mallorca.puntoreforma.es/blog/cuanto-tarda-reforma-mallorca/): Real renovation timelines in Mallorca by project type: bathroom, kitchen, full flat and exterior works, phases and what causes delays on the island.
- [Humedades en Mallorca](https://mallorca.puntoreforma.es/blog/humedades-impermeabilizacion-mallorca/): How to diagnose damp, leaks and waterproofing issues in Mallorca properties: causes, solutions and when to call a specialist.
- [Licencias para reformar en Mallorca](https://mallorca.puntoreforma.es/blog/licencias-permisos-reforma-mallorca/): Comunicación previa and licencia urbanística in Palma and Mallorca: which process applies to your project and how to apply.
- [Precio reforma integral Mallorca 2026](https://mallorca.puntoreforma.es/blog/precio-reforma-integral-mallorca/): Full renovation costs for a flat or house in Mallorca in 2026: real prices per m², breakdown by trade and what affects the final budget.
- [Reforma de baño en Mallorca](https://mallorca.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-bano-mallorca/): Bathroom renovation in Mallorca: costs, layout options, materials, accessibility upgrades and when a building permit is needed.
- [Reforma de cocina en Mallorca](https://mallorca.puntoreforma.es/blog/reforma-cocina-mallorca/): Kitchen renovation in Mallorca: best layouts, materials that withstand the island climate, installation and realistic 2026 prices.
- [Reformar piso antiguo en Palma](https://mallorca.puntoreforma.es/blog/reformar-piso-antiguo-palma/): What to check when renovating an old flat in Palma: structure, wiring, plumbing, damp and heritage building considerations.
- [Reformar piso pequeño en Palma](https://mallorca.puntoreforma.es/blog/reformar-piso-pequeno-palma/): How to renovate a small flat in Palma with better layout, more storage and modern design without losing square metres.
- [Rehabilitación de fachadas Mallorca](https://mallorca.puntoreforma.es/blog/rehabilitacion-fachadas-mallorca/): Guide for communities in Mallorca on facade, roof and terrace rehabilitation: permits, subsidies, technical project requirements and timelines.
